data.body: FRAC-25 implementation complete — 6 commits on frac-25-apply-campus (9fe254b lattice catchup, 017269c index.css tokens, b18b5b3 CampusPage surface, ba3bbc5 Campus.tsx text-white bulk, b7bca9f Campus.tsx surface/SectorHeader/border, 6a8581f Campus.tsx typography NEAR). Declared 4 house-campus tokens (light/deep/light-foreground/deep-foreground — first paired-from-day-one declaration). Migrated CampusPage.tsx (1 site: main inline style → bg-house-campus-light + text-house-campus-light-foreground, style prop removed) + Campus.tsx (40+ text-white sites + InlineLink constant L24-25 + L185 inline color + L273 raw <a> + 4 surface/SectorHeader/border sites at L161/L173/L190/L499 + 24 typography NEAR sites: 18 body cluster + 1 title L230 + 3 subtitle L200/L500/L529 + PhotoPlaceholder caption L176 + bio link row L534 + L503 Nietzsche byline + L570 P.S. prose). GAP-deferred italic-aside cluster preserved verbatim (5 sites: L218/L367/L419/L453/L532 — color migrated, typography intact). Tests: pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm test 4/4 baseline failures only (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen) — no regressions. Build: pnpm build clean; compiled CSS includes all new .{text,bg,border,decoration}-house-campus-{light,deep}[-foreground][/<n>] utilities and existing .text-{body,title,subtitle} tiers. Grep verification (text-white|decoration-white|border-white|bg-white|bg-black|#fff|#2E6B4A|#1A3A2E) returns ZERO matches on Campus.tsx and one EXCLUDED match on CampusPage.tsx:9 FractalPattern color=#1A3A2E (out of scope per audit + FRAC-20 precedent). Mobile 375px browser verification: NOT performed — no browser MCP available in this session; documented as gap for the reviewer to spot-check (body size-up text-sm→text-base is the largest visible delta).

VERDICT: PASS

Reviewed cold against plan at .lattice/plans/task_01KTJQF0JQJHHCDYKEY6WJ7H8D.md.

Reviewed the full diff frac-24-audit-campus..HEAD (6 logical commits matching the plan's commit strategy 1-6). Verified src/index.css token block, both .tsx files end-to-end, ran grep verification, ran typecheck + tests. Spot-checked L24-25 inlineLinkClass, L161 PrimaryButton bg-foreground, L173 PhotoPlaceholder triple migration (bg+border+text), L174 caption, L176 caption .text-body, L185 section root className (style prop removed), L190 SectorHeader color=var(...deep), L196 display no-op, L200 subtitle, L218 italic-aside preserved (italic + text-xs md:text-sm), L230 .text-title (normal-case retained, font-serif dropped), L233/259/384/403/447/485/507/519/542/550/583 body cluster .text-body, L261/268/282/286/442/585 font-semibold strongs, L273 raw <a> decoration, L367/419/453/532 italic-aside cluster preserved (GAP-deferred), L499 blockquote border, L500 McCarren subtitle italic preserved, L503 byline footer .text-body, L529 bio name subtitle, L534 bio link row .text-body, L537/543 small marker color migrations, L570 P.S. .text-body.

Acceptance checklist (key items):
- [PASS] 4 token declarations in @theme (FRAC-21+42 comment extended to credit FRAC-25 + paired-from-day-one milestone)
- [PASS] CampusPage.tsx surface migration (style prop removed; FractalPattern color=#1A3A2E preserved as audit-excluded)
- [PASS] Campus.tsx 40+ text-white sites migrated
- [PASS] InlineLink constant + L273 raw <a> decoration
- [PASS] L161 PrimaryButton bg-foreground; L173 PhotoPlaceholder triple; L190 SectorHeader CSS var; L499 blockquote
- [PASS] Typography NEAR migrations (body 18, title 1, subtitle 3, caption, bio link, byline 503, P.S. 570)
- [PASS] GAP-deferred italic-aside cluster preserved at L218/367/419/453/532 (color migrated, italic + size classes verbatim)
- [PASS] grep verification: zero matches in Campus.tsx; only excluded FractalPattern #1A3A2E in CampusPage.tsx:9
- [PASS] no DESIGN.md / audit / audit-prompt changes; scope limited to src/index.css + CampusPage.tsx + Campus.tsx + lattice bookkeeping
- [PASS] 6 logical commits per plan strategy
- [PASS] tests baseline-only

Tests: typecheck=clean, tests=4 failed (exactly the documented baselines: footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen) / 143 passed, build=not run separately (impl reported pass).
Browser verification at 375px: not performed in review session — flagging for orchestrator/human eyes-on before merge. The body cluster size-up (text-sm -> text-base at mobile, font-light -> 400) is the largest visible rendering delta and is the only one warranting a 375px spot-check.

No inline fixes needed. Implementation matches the plan with high fidelity.
